title: Flea Treatment in Rye, NY
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment services in Rye, Westchester. Expert flea extermination for homes and businesses. Prices from $350-$650. Same-day service available.
intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in your Rye home can be frustrating and uncomfortable for both your family and pets. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive flea treatment services throughout Rye, from the historic homes near Boston Post Road to modern residences in the Greenhaven neighborhood. Our experienced technicians use safe, effective methods to eliminate fleas at all life stages and prevent future infestations.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Westchester County for years with proven flea elimination methods tailored to Rye's unique mix of historic estates and waterfront properties. Our licensed technicians understand the specific challenges posed by fleas in this area and deliver fast, reliable results with treatments that are safe for children and pets.
localContext: Rye's proximity to Long Island Sound and abundance of parks like Marshlands Conservancy create ideal conditions for outdoor pets to pick up fleas, which can quickly spread throughout your home. Whether you live in one of the charming Tudor homes in Indian Village or a contemporary residence near Rye Golf Club, our team provides customized flea treatment solutions for all property types.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Rye, NY?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment services in Rye typically range from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your home, severity of the infestation, and number of treatments required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: Most flea treatments show significant results within 24-48 hours. However, because fleas have multiple life stages, a complete elimination typically requires 2-3 weeks and may involve follow-up treatments to address newly hatched fleas and ensure your home remains flea-free.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe for pets and children when applied correctly. We recommend keeping pets and family members away from treated areas for 2-4 hours during application, after which the home is safe to re-enter.

faqs.question: Do I need to prepare my Rye home before flea treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes, we recommend vacuuming thoroughly, washing pet bedding in hot water, and removing pets during treatment. Our technicians will provide a detailed preparation checklist when scheduling your service to ensure maximum effectiveness of the treatment.
